metadata.title: States PCS: Gujarat GK Questions for GPSC Exams

questions.question: Which district in Gujarat is the top producer of isabgul (psyllium)?
questions.explanation: Mehsana district is the leading producer of isabgul (psyllium) in Gujarat.

questions.question: Which town in Gujarat is renowned for its agricultural and trade significance due to the influence of Asaita Thakar?
questions.explanation: Asaita Thakar, a prominent figure in Gujarat’s cultural history, significantly influenced Unjha, a town known for its agricultural and trade importance in the region.

questions.question: Which community in Gujarat is known for particularly celebrating Shravan Purnima?
questions.explanation: Shravan Purnima holds special importance for Gujarat’s coastal fishing communities, celebrated on the full moon of the monsoon month.

questions.question: Which traditional dance is performed by the Thakor rulers of North Gujarat?
questions.explanation: Thakor rulers of North Gujarat traditionally perform the Thaga or Thakar dance called ‘Mufarpe’.

questions.question: Where is the memorial of Shri Rang Avdhoot Maharaj located in Gujarat?
questions.explanation: The memorial of Shri Rang Avdhoot Maharaj, a noted spiritual leader, is located in Nareshwar, Gujarat, on the banks of the Narmada River.

questions.question: Who is the saint-poet father of Kunvarbai mentioned in Premanand Bhatt’s composition Kunverbai nu Mameru?
questions.explanation: Kunvarbai, daughter of saint-poet Narsinh Mehta, is featured in Premanand Bhatt’s composition Kunverbai nu Mameru, which narrates her wedding customs.

questions.question: What is the name of the memorial dedicated to Morarji Desai in Ahmedabad?
questions.explanation: Morarji Desai, India’s first Gujarati Prime Minister, has a memorial called Abhay Ghat in Ahmedabad, his cremation site symbolizing his fearless and principled public life.

questions.question: In which Indian state is the memorial of Mahadev Desai located?
questions.explanation: Mahadev Desai’s memorial is located in Gujarat.

questions.question: Which learned Islamic scholar migrated from Persia and settled in Gujarat during the reign of Sultan Mahmud Begada?
questions.explanation: Abul Fazl Ghazruni, a learned Islamic scholar, migrated from Persia and settled in Gujarat during Sultan Mahmud Begada’s reign.

questions.question: Who was the first president of the Gujarati Sahitya Parishad?
questions.explanation: Govardhanram Tripathi was the first president of the Gujarati Sahitya Parishad.
